content.text: codex "Read specs/CODEX_INSTRUCTIONS.md and specs/DOMAIN_MODEL.md then implement step 2 from the build order: create the Frame and FrameHistory MongoDB domain model including all enums"
I’ll read the domain spec and backend build setup first, then add the MongoDB documents/enums in the package style the project already uses.

The current backend doesn’t yet include Spring Data MongoDB, so the domain annotations from the spec won’t compile until that dependency is added. I’m checking the test inventory now to see whether step 2 has a named test requirement or whether tests start at repository coverage in step 4.

`TESTS.md` has repository tests starting at step 4, but no separate domain-only test names for step 2. I’ll keep this step to the domain model plus the Mongo dependency/auditing hook needed for it to compile and behave as specified.

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: src/backend/build.gradle
@@
 dependencies {
     implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-web'
     implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-actuator'
+    implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb'
 
     testImplementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-test'
     testRuntimeOnly 'org.junit.platform:junit-platform-launcher'
 }
*** End Patch

content.text:
Implemented step 2 from the build order.

Added the MongoDB domain model under [domain](/Users/faizalkhan/Desktop/frame-inventory-exercise-main/src/backend/src/main/java/com/global/ct/frameinventory/domain):
- `Frame` mapped to `frames`
- `FrameHistory` mapped to `frame_history`
- Embedded model classes: `Location`, `Site`, `FrameFormat`, `Commercials`, `Lifecycle`, `ExternalRefs`
- Enums: `FrameStatus`, `MediaType`, `SiteType`, `ChangeType`

Also updated:
- [build.gradle](/Users/faizalkhan/Desktop/frame-inventory-exercise-main/src/backend/build.gradle:20) to add `spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb`
- [Application.java](/Users/faizalkhan/Desktop/frame-inventory-exercise-main/src/backend/src/main/java/com/global/ct/frameinventory/Application.java:6) to enable Mongo auditing with `@EnableMongoAuditing`
- `frameReference` has a unique Mongo index via `@Indexed(unique = true)`
- `Lifecycle.createdAt` / `updatedAt` use `@CreatedDate` / `@LastModifiedDate`

Verification:
- `docker compose build backend` passed.
- `./gradlew --no-daemon test` passed inside a JDK 21 Docker container.

Note: the requested `specs/...` files live at `docs/specs/...` in this repo, so I used those.
